meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: The Freelancer's AI Toolkit
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI noise. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to standardize your stack, ship faster, and deliver premium client work.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates AI tool fatigue by providing a standardized, opinionated architecture for rapid deployment. By combining this scaffold with Claude Code, freelancers can automate boilerplate, enforce strict type safety, and maintain high-velocity output across multiple client projects without context switching or manual configuration overhead.
content.intro:
The modern freelancer’s desk is a graveyard of half-baked AI experiments and fragmented workflows. You start with high hopes, but quickly descend into a chaotic cycle of context switching, incompatible prompts, and codebases that feel like they were written by ten different developers. The cognitive load is no longer about the code; it is about managing the tools meant to build it.

Relief arrives with the Antigravity project template. It is not just a boilerplate; it is a battle-tested architectural framework designed to force consistency and speed. When paired with Claude Code, you stop fighting your IDE and start acting as a high-level technical architect, orchestrating complex features with the precision of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Initialize your project with the Antigravity core architecture to establish a consistent directory structure and environment configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the standard Antigravity web-app scaffold. Configure environment variables for Supabase and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define Schema & Domain Models
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out your database schema based on the Antigravity patterns, ensuring strict typing across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define the domain models for a multi-tenant SaaS. Generate Prisma schemas that align with the Antigravity user-auth module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate prisma schema for user, subscription, and project entities based on Antigravity standards"

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Leverage the template's pre-built API handlers to scaffold endpoints, reducing manual boilerplate to near zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD API routes for the 'Project' entity following the Antigravity patterns for error handling and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create next.js api routes for project management using standard antigravity error wrappers"

steps.title: Inject Client-Specific Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code's context-aware capabilities to implement business logic within the safety of the Antigravity constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core business logic for project status transitions, ensuring all side effects are handled via the Antigravity event-bus.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement status transition logic in src/services/projectService.ts"

steps.title: Final QA & Performance Audit
steps.description: Perform a systematic code review using automated tools to ensure compliance with the Antigravity architectural guidelines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for violations of the Antigravity design patterns and suggest performance optimizations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "perform architectural audit against antigravity best practices"

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated .claude-ignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts.
Map your client's specific business vocabulary into a custom 'context.md' file so Claude Code understands your project's domain language.
Use Antigravity's event-bus pattern to decouple side effects, making your code significantly easier to debug and test.
Keep your prompt history inside a 'prompts/' directory to create a repeatable library of complex feature implementations.
Force Claude Code to output 'why' before 'what' when generating code to ensure logic alignment with your architectural vision.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, document the specific patterns you developed and create your own custom template fork of Antigravity to speed up your next client build.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start shipping professional-grade SaaS products that actually scale. By mastering the Antigravity workflow, you transform from a coder into a high-leverage product engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
